The response maintains a high level of context relevance, persona consistency with an honorable merchant character who is also business-minded but not dishonest. The dialogue feels natural and fits the scenario well without being too conspicuous about sensitive issues like missing ledger pages or safety alarms that could escalate tension unnecessarily in this context.
